entries.round: task:Use the 'web_fetch' tool to analyze the content and structure of https://blockhay.com/. Propose a highly SEO-optimized modern tech stack (e.g., Next.js App Router, Tailwind, Headless CMS/MDX) to clone its functionality (Crypto/Blockchain news site). Focus heavily on Core Web Vitals, Semantic HTML, Schema.org Markup, dynamic sitemaps, and SSR/SSG. Output the final plan by completely overwriting 'spec.md' and a 3-phase checklist in 'tasks.md' using <write_file> tags.
